recommendations.rationale: Strong rebound day, but Tencent remains below both 20-day and 60-day averages in a downtrend, so this looks like an early bounce rather than a confirmed swing entry.
evidence: Closed at 508.0, up 3.843% on the day
Still below ma20 518.09 and ma60 553.08
60-day range position is 0.1744, near the lower end of the range
Volume ratio 1.1013 shows only modest confirmation
risks: Downtrend can resume quickly after a single rebound session
Price is still below short-term resistance around the 20-day average
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims and holds above the 20-day average with stronger volume; a break back below 500 after this bounce would confirm weakness.

recommendations.rationale: Alibaba showed the strongest stock move in the group with clear volume expansion, making it a credible rebound candidate even though the broader trend is still not repaired.
evidence: Closed at 126.5, up 6.751% on the day
Volume ratio 1.8789 indicates strong participation
Flagged for volume-expansion in today's regime signals
Finished just below ma20 127.305 after trading as high as 127.9
risks: Primary regime is still downtrend because price remains below ma60 145.8
Failure to reclaim the 20-day average could turn this into a bull trap
recommendations.invalidation: If price fails to hold above 121-122 on follow-through or is rejected again below the 20-day average, the rebound setup is invalid.

recommendations.rationale: Xiaomi posted a strong gain, but it closed exactly at the session high while still sitting below both moving averages, so confirmation is not strong enough yet for accumulation.
evidence: Closed at 32.76, up 6.088% on the day
Still below ma20 33.249 and ma60 34.897
60-day range position is 0.2392, still in the lower quarter of its range
Volume ratio 1.2798 shows some confirmation but not a breakout surge
risks: Single-session momentum can fade quickly in a downtrend
Nearby overhead resistance at the 20-day average may cap follow-through
recommendations.invalidation: A failure to push above the 20-day average within the next few sessions or a reversal back toward 31.5 would invalidate the rebound watch.

recommendations.rationale: The broad Hong Kong ETF is acting more stable than the single-name rebounds, trading above the 20-day average in a range regime, which supports holding rather than chasing.
evidence: Closed at 26.2, up 3.15% on the day
Above ma20 25.643 but still slightly below ma60 26.4657
Range regime flag suggests consolidation rather than breakdown
60-day range position is 0.431, healthier than the tech names near the bottom of their ranges
risks: Failure to clear the 60-day average could keep the ETF trapped in a range
Broad market beta can weaken if the current risk-on tone fades
recommendations.invalidation: A close back below the 20-day average with weakening breadth would invalidate the hold bias and shift the name back to watch-only.

recommendations.rationale: Among the tech exposures, 3033.HK offers the cleanest way to participate in the risk-on rebound because it is already back above its 20-day average with liquid volume while diversifying single-name risk.
evidence: Closed at 4.83, up 5.689% on the day
Above ma20 4.7905 while still below ma60 5.1762
Range regime is healthier than the single-stock downtrend flags
Volume ratio 1.2568 and very high turnover indicate active participation
risks: The ETF is still below its 60-day average, so trend repair is incomplete
Tech-sector strength could reverse if internet-platform leaders fail to follow through
recommendations.invalidation: A loss of the 20-day average on closing basis or a break back below 4.70 would invalidate the accumulation setup.

recommendations.rationale: 3067.HK confirms the same tech rebound as 3033.HK and is above its 20-day average, but the lower turnover makes it a secondary hold rather than the preferred accumulation vehicle.
evidence: Closed at 10.37, up 5.386% on the day
Above ma20 10.279 but below ma60 11.0948
Range regime flag is constructive versus a downtrend label
Volume ratio 1.1346 confirms participation, though less strongly than 3033.HK
risks: Lower liquidity than 3033.HK can make execution less efficient
Trend remains vulnerable until price clears the 60-day average
recommendations.invalidation: A close back below the 20-day average or loss of 10.10 support would invalidate the hold stance.
